name: Downer Edi Limited
analysis: DOW has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$8.0154. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$8.0154, stop A$7.5834, target A$8.3300. Risk/reward is 0.73:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
